title: physaria australis
intro: Physaria australis, also known as desert bladdercaps, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Physaria australis include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, making a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
